title: Hug Trees With Gromit
description: The client for the Hug Trees With Gromit server. Make some bonkers stuff with yer mates!
body:
# Hug Trees With Gromit

Welcome to the client for the Hug Trees With Gromit server, a Minecraft server for my Discord server and gorgeous friends. This modpack comes pre-configured for the best visuals while balancing with performance.

## Credits

- Icon by [Wornyy](https://linktr.ee/worny)
- LainMI and DarkhaxDev for [Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked), available on Curseforge. [MMPL License](https://github.com/zlainsama/CosmeticArmorReworked/blob/master/LICENSE.txt) and [source](https://github.com/zlainsama/CosmeticArmorReworked) are also available.

## Important

This modpack contains all the mods needed for joining the server as a client and does not contain server side mods. You can play this single player, but the pack does not come with 

**Allocate at least 8 GB of memory for this pack to run. If you enable Distant Horizons (an optional visual mod disabled by default) then increase this up to 12 GB or more if you can.**

## Feature mods

- Farmers Delight encourages you to devour a diverse diet of delicatessen.
- Create is expanded to the modern age with The Factory Must Grow. Explore petrochemical technologies to help grow your world.
- Once you're done with the industrial revolution, Mekanism 
- Spawn, Upgrade Aquatic, Critters & Companions and Naturalist should leave you never feeling lonely!

All mods can be found in the Modrinth ecosystem, except from Cosmetic Armor Reworked, where a link has been provided above.

### Things you can do on the server

- Claim chunks with a parties and permission system, protecting your area from mobs and other players.
- Make friends with many new creatures, be they avian, subterranian, or extra dimensional.
- Commit tax fraud with very real (fake) money.
- Organise your labor. Build a community. Announce yourselves as an independent state.

## Extra visual stuff.

There are some mods that come with this pack that are disabled by default. These are visual enhancing mods and are optional but performance intensive. These include:

- Iris
- Colorwheel (needed to make Create and its addons work with Iris)
- Distant Horizons
- Create Better Fps (improves performance of Create blocks when using shaders)
